abc-for-kids.name: ABC for kids
abc-for-kids.description: The simplest book on the market

old-combat-manual.name: Old combat manual
old-combat-manual.description: Old book about combat, worn and outdated, but might still contain something useful

twist-liek-a-snek.name: Twist liek a snek
twist-liek-a-snek.description: This book has a terrible grammar, seemingly written by some uneducated bandit, but despite that it quite well details how to properly evade attacks

medicine-for-dummies.name: Medicine for dummies
medicine-for-dummies.description: A simple book about healing, describing how to create some basic medicines

butchering-and-you.name: Butchering and you
butchering-and-you.description: An introductory book to animal butchering, that goes into further detail on how to make a use of animal parts, especially hides and bones

ode-to-whimsy-and-other-poems.id: Ode to Whimsy, and other poems
ode-to-whimsy-and-other-poems.name: Ode to Whimsy, and other poems
ode-to-whimsy-and-other-poems.description: A short and wonderful book of poetry that fills one with appreciation for life

a-glint-on-the-sand.name: A Glint On The Sand
a-glint-on-the-sand.description: This books recounts a tale of shipwrecked crew accidentally discovering glassmaking while cooking on a beach. More importantly, it details the processees and materials necessary to manufacture glass

shellfish-desires.name: Shellfish desires
shellfish-desires.description: A cookbook detailing various methods of cleaning and preparing crab, clam, snail, turtle, and other aquatic animals

rat-fang.name: Rat fang
rat-fang.description: Fang of a huge rat, not very sharp, but can still pierce a human skin if enough force is applied

wolf-fang.name: Wolf fang
wolf-fang.description: Fang of a wild wolf. Somewhat sharp, still not very useful. Maybe if it had a bit better quality...

boar-tusk.name: Boar tusk
boar-tusk.description: Tusk of a wild boar. Visibly worn and not very sharp

fish-fillet.name: Fish fillet
fish-fillet.description: Cuts of meat from a fish that was too big to eat whole

glass-phial.name: Glass phial
glass-phial.description: Small glass phial, a perfect container for a potion

glass-bottle.name: Glass bottle
glass-bottle.description: A glass bottle, perfect for carrying a drink around

camping-supplies.name: Camping supplies
camping-supplies.description: Bedroll, tent, small chest, and generally just anything that could be needed to establish a camp

coil-of-rope.name: Coil of rope
coil-of-rope.description: A nice, long coil of rope, for whatever use you might find (although you have a feeling it will only be very situational)

mountain-goat-horn.name: Mountain goat horn
mountain-goat-horn.description: A curved and sturdy horn of a mountain goat. While not very useful in itself, it makes for a nice decoration

rat-tail.name: Rat tail
rat-tail.description: Tail of a huge rat. Doesn't seem very useful, but maybe some meat could be recovered from it

rat-pelt.name: Rat pelt
rat-pelt.description: Pelt of a huge rat. Fur has terrible quality, but maybe leather could be used for something if you gather more?

high-quality-wolf-fang.name: High quality wolf fang
high-quality-wolf-fang.description: Fang of a wild wolf. Very sharp, undamaged and surprisingly clean

wolf-pelt.name: Wolf pelt
wolf-pelt.description: Pelt of a wild wolf. It's a bit damaged so it won't fetch a great price, but the leather itself could be useful

boar-hide.name: Boar hide
boar-hide.description: Thick hide of a wild boar. Too stiff for clothing, but might be useful for an armor

boar-meat.name: Boar meat
boar-meat.description: Fatty meat of a wild boar, all it needs is to be cooked

high-quality-boar-tusk.name: High quality boar tusk
high-quality-boar-tusk.description: Tusk of a wild boar. Sharp and long enough to easily kill an adult human

bear-hide.name: Bear hide
bear-hide.description: A strong hide of a wild bear, so strong that even steel struggles against it

bear-claw.name: Bear claw
bear-claw.description: Large and dangerous claw of a wild bear, but it has seen better days

sharp-bear-claw.name: Sharp bear claw
sharp-bear-claw.description: Large and dangerous claw of a wild bear, sharp enough to easily cut through meat

weak-monster-bone.name: Weak monster bone
weak-monster-bone.description: Mutated and dark bone of a monster. While on the weaker side, it's still very strong and should be useful for crafting after some processing

goat-meat.name: Goat meat
goat-meat.description: Lean meat of a goat, it's pretty tough and needs to be cooked for a long time

mountain-goat-hide.name: Mountain goat hide
mountain-goat-hide.description: Thick hide of a mountain goat hide. Not as strong as boar hide, but this one can actually be turned into clothes after some processing

pristine-mountain-goat-horn.name: Pristine mountain goat horn
pristine-mountain-goat-horn.description: Curved and sturdy horn of a mountain goat. It's noticeably bigger than average and seems to be even sturdier

crab-meat.name: Crab meat
crab-meat.description: A sandy shell filled with crab meat. It needs to be cleaned before it can be cooked

crab-claw.name: Crab claw
crab-claw.description: A large claw of a crab, covered in abrasions and barnicles, but it makes a nice souvenier

giant-crab-claw.name: Giant crab claw
giant-crab-claw.description: A large claw of a crab in pristine condition, still sharp and strong enough to take a finger off

alligator-meat.name: Alligator meat
alligator-meat.description: A lean chunk of alligator meat. It's tough, with a strange but not unappealing smell

alligator-skin.name: Alligator skin
alligator-skin.description: Rough, scaly hide of an alligator. Deceptively strong and flexible, but uncomfortable to touch and terrible at keeping the cold at bay

turtle-meat.name: Turtle meat
turtle-meat.description: A lean cut of turtle meat. It's tender and versatile, but difficult to prepare

turtle-shell.name: Turtle shell
turtle-shell.description: A dense, thick turtle shell. It's stronger than steel, but too bulky to work with

giant-snake-meat.name: Giant snake meat
giant-snake-meat.description: A lean cut of snake meat. It's rubbery, and looks difficult to cook

giant-snake-skin.name: Giant snake skin
giant-snake-skin.description: Smooth, scaly hide of a giant snake. Very durable, but very thin and a poor insulator

frog-meat.name: Frog meat
frog-meat.description: Surprisingly tender meat from a frog

frog-hide.name: Frog hide
frog-hide.description: Slippery hide of a giant frog. If you could remove the toxins from it, the leather could be put into good use

low-quality-iron-ore.name: Low quality iron ore
low-quality-iron-ore.description: Iron content is rather low and there are a lot of problematic components that can't be fully removed, which will affect created materials

iron-ore.name: Iron ore
iron-ore.description: It has a decent iron content and can be smelt into market-quality iron

atratan-ore.name: Atratan ore
atratan-ore.description: A dark-colored ore said to have minuscule magical effects, but used almost exclusively for refining all types of iron

silver-ore.name: Silver ore
silver-ore.description: Peculiar for its ability to direct or disrupt magic

coal.name: Coal
coal.description: A flammable material with extremely high carbon content

charcoal.name: Charcoal
charcoal.description: A flammable material with extremely high carbon content, created by strongly heating wood

piece-of-rough-wood.name: Piece of rough wood
piece-of-rough-wood.description: Cheapest form of wood. There's a lot of bark and malformed pieces

piece-of-wood.name: Piece of wood
piece-of-wood.description: Average quality wood. There's a lot of bark and malformed pieces

piece-of-ash-wood.name: Piece of ash wood
piece-of-ash-wood.description: Strong yet elastic, it's best wood you can hope to find around. There's a lot of bark and malformed pieces

belmart-leaf.name: Belmart leaf
belmart-leaf.description: Small, round, dark-green leaves with very good disinfectant properties

golmoon-leaf.name: Golmoon leaf
golmoon-leaf.description: Big green-brown leaves that can be applied to wounds to speed up their healing

oneberry.name: Oneberry
oneberry.description: Small blue berries capable of stimulating body's natural healing

silver-thistle.name: Silver thistle
silver-thistle.description: Rare herb that usually grows high up in mountains, a potent healing ingredient

cooking-herbs.name: Parsley, sage, rosemary and thyme
cooking-herbs.description: A collection of various herbs commonly used to enhance the flavour and nutrition of dishes

wool.name: Wool
wool.description: A handful of wool, raw and unprocessed

silica-sand.name: Silica sand
silica-sand.description: Sand made potent by the remains of countless generations of creatures that lived and died in the body of water it was taken from

flax.name: Flax
flax.description: A bundle of flax, raw and unprocessed

clam.name: Clam
clam.description: Common shellfish found in the sand and mud around the lake shore. Can't be eaten raw

wild-onion.name: Wild onion
wild-onion.description: A wild root vegetable sometimes used to add flavor to dishes. Can't be eaten raw

wild-garlic.name: Wild garlic
wild-garlic.description: A wild root vegetable known to possess anti-fungal properties, sometimes used to add flavor to dishes. Can't be eaten raw

wild-potato.name: Wild potato
wild-potato.description: A wild nutrient-rich stem tuber that can be used in a variety of dishes. Can't be eaten raw

ratfish.name: Ratfish
ratfish.description: A small sweetwater fish, named after its unremarkable coloration and propensity to travel in large groups

minnow.name: Minnow
minnow.description: One of the variety of small fish that inhabit rivers and streams

mackerel-shark.name: Mackerel shark
mackerel-shark.description: A shark small enough to fit in a stream. Makes up for its size with its feistiness and big mouth

trout.name: Trout
trout.description: A fish large enough for a full meal and common in most rivers, making it a convenient source of food. So far, this has not effected their population

carp.name: Carp
carp.description: It hasn't grown into any of its more powerful forms yet, so its meat is still fatty and plump

catfish.name: Catfish
catfish.description: A large fish with whiskers. Usually found near the bottom of lakes, where it feeds on ratfish and pretty much everything else it can hunt

bonemeal.name: Bonemeal
bonemeal.description: Powdered bones and teeth, that can be used as an organic fertilizer

low-quality-iron-ingot.name: Low quality iron ingot
low-quality-iron-ingot.description: It has a lot of impurities, resulting in it being noticeably below the market standard

iron-ingot.name: Iron ingot
iron-ingot.description: It doesn't suffer from any excessive impurities and can be used without worries

steel-ingot.name: Steel ingot
steel-ingot.description: Basic alloy of iron, harder and more resistant

turtle-shellplate.name: Turtle shellplate
turtle-shellplate.description: Small, dense plates capable of reflecting mighty blows. Useless in their current form, but can be turned into something useful with enough effort and focus

silver-ingot.name: Silver ingot
silver-ingot.description: Too soft to use as weapon material, but has potential for use in magic tools

piece-of-wolf-rat-leather.name: Piece of wolf rat leather
piece-of-wolf-rat-leather.description: It's slightly damaged and seems useless for anything that requires precise work

processed-rat-pelt.name: Processed rat pelt
processed-rat-pelt.description: Processed pelt of a huge rat. It's of a barely acceptable quality, but it's still a miracle with how terrible the basic material was

piece-of-wolf-leather.name: Piece of wolf leather
piece-of-wolf-leather.description: Somewhat strong, should offer some protection when turned into armor

processed-wolf-pelt.name: Processed wolf pelt
processed-wolf-pelt.description: Processed pelt of a wild wolf. It's a nice, stylish material, with fur that's feels good to touch

piece-of-boar-leather.name: Piece of boar leather
piece-of-boar-leather.description: Thick and resistant leather, too stiff for clothes but perfect for armor

processed-boar-hide.name: Processed boar hide
processed-boar-hide.description: Processed hide of a wild boar. It's a thick, heavy material, with short rough fur, but it's quite strong

piece-of-goat-leather.name: Piece of goat leather
piece-of-goat-leather.description: Thick and resistant, just barely elastic enough to be used for clothing

processed-goat-hide.name: Processed goat hide
processed-goat-hide.description: Processed hide of a wild goat. It's a resistant material, with short and rough fur

piece-of-bear-leather.name: Piece of bear leather
piece-of-bear-leather.description: Strong and resistant, but too thick for clothing

processed-bear-hide.name: Processed bear hide
processed-bear-hide.description: Strong, resistant, and warm, with fluffy fur

piece-of-alligator-leather.name: Piece of alligator leather
piece-of-alligator-leather.description: Strong and flexible, but too uncomfortable to use as clothing

piece-of-snakeskin-leather.name: Piece of snakeskin leather
piece-of-snakeskin-leather.description: Durable and thin, but a poor insulator

piece-of-frog-leather.name: Piece of frog leather
piece-of-frog-leather.description: The toxins have been removed and the slime coagulated into a waxy coating

animal-fat.name: Animal fat
animal-fat.description: White, thick, oily substance, rendered from animal tissue

wool-cloth.name: Wool cloth
wool-cloth.description: Thick and warm, might possibly absorb some punches

linen-cloth.name: Linen cloth
linen-cloth.description: Bolt of durable and thin cloth that won't restrict mobility

iron-chainmail.name: Iron chainmail
iron-chainmail.description: Dozens of tiny iron rings linked together. Nowhere near a wearable form, turning it into armor will still take a lot of effort and focus

steel-chainmail.name: Steel chainmail
steel-chainmail.description: Dozens of tiny steel rings linked together. Nowhere near a wearable form, turning it into armor will still take a lot of effort and focus

scraps-of-wolf-rat-meat.name: Scraps of wolf rat meat
scraps-of-wolf-rat-meat.description: Ignoring where they come from and all the attached diseases, they actually look edible. Just remember to cook it first

processed-rough-wood.name: Processed rough wood
processed-rough-wood.description: Cheapest form of wood, ready to be used. Despite being rather weak, it still has a lot of uses

processed-wood.name: Processed wood
processed-wood.description: Average quality wood, ready to be used

processed-ash-wood.name: Processed ash wood
processed-ash-wood.description: High quality wood, just waiting to be turned into a piece of equipment

processed-weak-monster-bone.name: Processed weak monster bone
processed-weak-monster-bone.description: Polished and cleaned bones of a weak monster, just waiting to be turned into a piece of equipment

potash.name: Potash
potash.description: An alchemical substance derived from plant ash, sought after for production of bleach, soap and glass

raw-glass.name: Raw glass
raw-glass.description: Molten piece of glass, yet to be shaped into something useful

basic-spare-parts.name: Basic spare parts
basic-spare-parts.description: Some cheap and simple spare parts, like bindings and screws, necessary for crafting equipment

cheap-short-iron-blade.name: Cheap short iron blade
cheap-short-iron-blade.description: Crude blade made of iron. Perfect length for a dagger, but could be also used for a spear

short-iron-blade.name: Short iron blade
short-iron-blade.description: A good iron blade. Perfect length for a dagger, but could be also used for a spear

short-steel-blade.name: Short steel blade
short-steel-blade.description: A good steel blade. Perfect length for a dagger, but could be also used for a spear

cheap-long-iron-blade.name: Cheap long iron blade
cheap-long-iron-blade.description: Crude blade made of iron, with a perfect length for a sword

long-iron-blade.name: Long iron blade
long-iron-blade.description: Good blade made of iron, with a perfect length for a sword

long-steel-blade.name: Long steel blade
long-steel-blade.description: Good blade made of steel, with a perfect length for a sword

cheap-iron-axe-head.name: Cheap iron axe head
cheap-iron-axe-head.description: A heavy axe head made of low quality iron

iron-axe-head.name: Iron axe head
iron-axe-head.description: A heavy axe head made of steel

steel-axe-head.name: Steel axe head
steel-axe-head.description: A heavy axe head made of steel

cheap-iron-hammer-head.name: Cheap iron hammer head
cheap-iron-hammer-head.description: A crude ball made of low quality iron, with a small hole for the handle

iron-hammer-head.name: Iron hammer head
iron-hammer-head.description: A crude ball made of iron, with a small hole for the handle

steel-hammer-head.name: Steel hammer head
steel-hammer-head.description: A blocky piece of steel, with a small hole for the handle

simple-short-wooden-hilt.name: Simple short wooden hilt
simple-short-wooden-hilt.description: A short handle for a sword or maybe a dagger

short-wooden-hilt.name: Short wooden hilt
short-wooden-hilt.description: A short handle for a sword or maybe a dagger

short-ash-wood-hilt.name: Short ash wood hilt
short-ash-wood-hilt.description: A short handle for a sword or maybe a dagger

simple-medium-wooden-handle.name: Simple medium wooden handle
simple-medium-wooden-handle.description: A medium handle for an axe or a hammer

medium-wooden-handle.name: Medium wooden handle
medium-wooden-handle.description: A medium handle for an axe or a hammer

medium-ash-wood-handle.name: Medium ash wood handle
medium-ash-wood-handle.description: A medium handle for an axe or a hammer

simple-long-wooden-shaft.name: Simple long wooden shaft
simple-long-wooden-shaft.description: A long shaft for a spear, somewhat uneven

long-wooden-shaft.name: Long wooden shaft
long-wooden-shaft.description: A long shaft for a spear, somewhat uneven

long-ash-wood-shaft.name: Long ash wood shaft
long-ash-wood-shaft.description: A long shaft for a spear

cheap-short-iron-hilt.description: A short handle for a sword or maybe a dagger, heavy

short-iron-hilt.name: Short iron hilt
short-iron-hilt.description: A short handle for a sword or maybe a dagger, heavy

short-steel-hilt.name: Short steel hilt

cheap-medium-iron-handle.name: Cheap medium iron handle
cheap-medium-iron-handle.description: A medium handle for an axe or a hammer, very heavy

medium-iron-handle.name: Medium iron handle
medium-iron-handle.description: A medium handle for an axe or a hammer, very heavy

medium-steel-handle.name: Medium steel handle
medium-steel-handle.description: A medium handle for an axe or a hammer, very heavy

cheap-long-iron-shaft.name: Cheap long iron shaft
cheap-long-iron-shaft.description: A long shaft for a spear, extremely heavy

long-steel-shaft.name: Long steel shaft

short-weak-bone-hilt.name: Short weak bone hilt
short-weak-bone-hilt.description: A short handle for a sword or maybe a dagger, made of a weak monster's bone

medium-weak-bone-handle.name: Medium weak bone handle
medium-weak-bone-handle.description: A medium handle for an axe or a hammer, made of a weak monster's bone

long-weak-bone-shaft.name: Long weak bone shaft
long-weak-bone-shaft.description: A long shaft for a spear, made of weak monster's bone

turtleshell-hilt.name: Turtleshell hilt
turtleshell-hilt.description: A short handle for a sword or maybe a dagger, made of turtle shellplate

turtleshell-handle.name: Turtleshell handle
turtleshell-handle.description: A medium handle for an axe or a hammer, made of turtle shellplate

turtleshell-shaft.name: Turtleshell shaft
turtleshell-shaft.description: A long shaft for a spear, made of turtle shellplate

wolf-leather-helmet-armor.name: Wolf leather helmet armor
wolf-leather-helmet-armor.description: Strenghtened wolf leather, ready to be used as a part of a helmet

boar-leather-helmet-armor.name: Boar leather helmet armor
boar-leather-helmet-armor.description: Strong boar leather, ready to be used as a part of a helmet

bear-leather-helmet-armor.name: Bear leather helmet armor

alligator-leather-helmet-armor.name: Alligator leather helmet armor
alligator-leather-helmet-armor.description: Strong alligator leather, ready to be used as a part of a helmet

wolf-leather-chestplate-armor.name: Wolf leather cuirass
wolf-leather-chestplate-armor.description: Simple cuirass made of solid wolf leather, all it needs now is something softer to wear under it

boar-leather-chestplate-armor.name: Boar leather cuirass
boar-leather-chestplate-armor.description: Strong cuirass made of boar leather

bear-leather-chestplate-armor.name: Bear leather cuirass

alligator-leather-chestplate-armor.name: Alligator leather cuirass
alligator-leather-chestplate-armor.description: Strong cuirass made of alligator leather

wolf-leather-greaves.name: Wolf leather greaves
wolf-leather-greaves.description: Greaves made of wolf leather. Just attach them onto some pants and you are ready to go

boar-leather-greaves.name: Boar leather greaves
boar-leather-greaves.description: Greaves made of thick boar leather. Just attach them onto some pants and you are ready to go

iron-chainmail-helmet-armor.description: Best way to keep your head in one piece

turtleshell-helmet-armor.description: Best way to keep your head in one piece

turtleshell-chestplate.description: Basic turtle shellplate mail. Nowhere near as strong as a plate armor

iron-chainmail-greaves.description: Greaves made of iron chainmail. Just attach them onto some pants and you are ready to go

iron-chainmail-glove.description: Iron chainmail in a form ready to be applied onto a glove

steel-chainmail-glove.description: Steel chainmail in a form ready to be applied onto a glove

cheap-leather-vest.name: Cheap leather vest
cheap-leather-vest.description: Vest providing very low protection. Better not to know what's it made from

leather-vest.name: Leather vest
leather-vest.description: Comfortable leather vest, offering low protection

goat-leather-vest.name: Goat leather vest
goat-leather-vest.description: Comfortable leather vest, offering mediocre protection

snakeskin-vest.name: Snakeskin vest
snakeskin-vest.description: Comfortable snakeskin vest, offering decent protection

batrachian-vest.name: Batrachian vest
batrachian-vest.description: Comfortable leather vest, slippery enough to make enemy blows slide off

cheap-leather-pants.name: Cheap leather pants
cheap-leather-pants.description: Leather pants made from cheapest resources available

cheap-leather-hat.name: Cheap leather hat
cheap-leather-hat.description: A cheap leather hat to protect your head

leather-hat.name: Leather hat
leather-hat.description: A nice leather hat to protect your head

goat-leather-hat.name: Goat leather hat
goat-leather-hat.description: A solid leather hat to protect your head

snakeskin-hat.name: Snakeskin hat
snakeskin-hat.description: A solid snakeskin hat to protect your head

batrachian-hat.name: Batrachian hat
batrachian-hat.description: A slippery leather hat to protect your head

leather-gloves.name: Leather gloves
leather-gloves.description: Strong leather gloves, perfect for handling rough and sharp objects

goat-leather-gloves.name: Goat leather gloves
goat-leather-gloves.description: Strong leather gloves, perfect for handling rough and sharp objects

snakeskin-gloves.name: Snakeskin gloves
snakeskin-gloves.description: Strong snakeskin gloves, perfect for handling rough and sharp objects

batrachian-gloves.name: Batrachian gloves
batrachian-gloves.description: Strong leather gloves, with membranes to help you swim

cheap-leather-shoes.name: Cheap leather shoes
cheap-leather-shoes.description: Shoes made of thin and cheap leather. Even then, they are in every single aspect better than not having any

work-shoes.name: Work shoes
work-shoes.description: Work shoes made of a mix of leather and wool. While they provide no protection, they are very comfortable for moving around

leather-shoes.name: Leather shoes
leather-shoes.description: Solid shoes made of leather, a must have for any traveler

goat-leather-shoes.name: Goat leather shoes
goat-leather-shoes.description: Strong shoes made of leather, a must have for any traveler

snakeskin-boots.name: Snakeskin boots
snakeskin-boots.description: Strong boots made of snakeskin, a must have for any traveler

batrachian-shoes.name: Batrachian shoes
batrachian-shoes.description: Strong shoes made of frog leather, that let you slide along the ground

wool-shirt.name: Wool shirt
wool-shirt.description: It's not thick enough to provide any physical protection, but on the plus side it's light, it's warm, and it and doesn't block your moves

linen-vest.name: Linen vest
linen-vest.description: A thin, breezy vest that won't get in your way, however it won't keep you warm and offers no protection from attacks

wool-hat.name: Wool hat
wool-hat.description: Simple woollen hat to protect your head from cold

linen-bandanna.name: Linen bandanna
linen-bandanna.description: Simple linen bandanna to keep hair and sweat away from your eyes

wool-gloves.name: Wool gloves
wool-gloves.description: Warm and comfy, but they don't provide any protection

linen-gloves.name: Linen gloves
linen-gloves.description: Thin and tight, they help to maintain a grip on something, but they don't provide any protection

rat-pelt-cape.name: Rat pelt cape
rat-pelt-cape.description: It's a cape... made of wolf rat pelts. Only for poor or insane

wolf-pelt-cape.name: Wolf pelt cape
wolf-pelt-cape.description: An elegant cape made from wolf pelts. Doesn't provide much protection, but is light enough to not hinder your movements

boar-hide-cape.name: Boar hide cape
boar-hide-cape.description: A rough cape made from boar hides. Offers a nice protection, but is heavy and stiff

goat-hide-cape.name: Goat hide cape
goat-hide-cape.description: A rough cape made from goat hides

bear-hide-cape.name: Bear hide cape
bear-hide-cape.description: A thick, heavy, and warm furry cape, made from a bear hide

batrachian-cape.name: Batrachian cape
batrachian-cape.description: A slippery cape made from frogskin. Technically waterproof, but doesn't cover your entire body.

wooden-training-shield-base.name: Wooden training shield base
wooden-training-shield-base.description: A primitive but cheap form of a shield

cheap-wooden-shield-base.name: Cheap wooden shield base
cheap-wooden-shield-base.description: Cheap shield component made of wood, basically just a few planks barely holding together

crude-wooden-shield-base.name: Crude wooden shield base
crude-wooden-shield-base.description: A shield base of rather bad quality, but at least it won't fall apart by itself

wooden-shield-base.name: Wooden shield base
wooden-shield-base.description: Proper wooden shield base, although it could use some additional reinforcement

ash-wood-shield-base.name: Ash wood shield base
ash-wood-shield-base.description: Solid wooden shield base, although still nowhere near as resistant as metal

crude-iron-shield-base.name: Crude iron shield base
crude-iron-shield-base.description: Heavy shield base made of low quality iron

iron-shield-base.name: Iron shield base
iron-shield-base.description: Solid and strong shield base, although it's quite heavy

steel-shield-base.name: Steel shield base
steel-shield-base.description: Mighty shield base, although it's quite heavy

turtleshell-shield-base.name: Turtleshell shield base
turtleshell-shield-base.description: Dense turtle shellplate base, although it's quite heavy

basic-shield-handle.name: Crude wooden shield handle
basic-shield-handle.description: A simple handle for holding the shield

wooden-shield-handle.name: Wooden shield handle
wooden-shield-handle.description: A decent wooden handle for holding the shield

ash-wood-shield-handle.name: Ash wood shield handle
ash-wood-shield-handle.description: A solid wooden handle for holding the shield

old-pickaxe.name: Old pickaxe
old-pickaxe.description: An old pickaxe that has seen better times, but is still usable

old-axe.name: Old axe
old-axe.description: An old axe that has seen better times, but is still usable

old-sickle.name: Old sickle
old-sickle.description: And old herb sickle that has seen better times, but is still usable

old-shovel.name: Old shovel
old-shovel.description: And old shovel that has seen better times, but can still be used to dig something up

iron-pickaxe.name: Iron pickaxe
iron-pickaxe.description: A decent pickaxe made of iron, strong enough for most ores

iron-chopping-axe.name: Iron chopping axe
iron-chopping-axe.description: A decent axe made of iron, hard and sharp enough for most of trees, even if they will still require an effort

iron-sickle.name: Iron sickle
iron-sickle.description: A decent sickle made of iron, sharp enough for most of plants

iron-shovel.name: Iron shovel
iron-shovel.description: A decent shovel made of iron, solid enough for most of your digging needs

makeshift-fishing-pole.name: Makeshift fishing pole
makeshift-fishing-pole.description: Little more than a piece of string tied to a stick, but sufficient to get a catch

stale-bread.name: Stale bread
stale-bread.description: Big piece of an old bread, still edible

carrot.name: Carrot
carrot.description: A delicious root that can be eaten raw

potato.name: Potato
potato.description: A common tuber with versatile culinary usage. Just remember to cook it first!

cooked-potato.name: Potato
cooked-potato.description: A common tuber with versatile culinary usage, though this one was simply cooked

cooked-clam.name: Boiled clam
cooked-clam.description: Common shellfish found around the lake shore that has been boiled, not steamed

weak-healing-powder.name: Weak healing powder
weak-healing-powder.description: Not very potent, but can still make body heal noticeably faster for quite a while

healing-powder.name: Healing powder
healing-powder.description: Not exactly powerful in its effects, but still makes the body heal noticeably faster and for a long time

oneberry-juice.name: Oneberry juice
oneberry-juice.description: Tastes kinda nice and provides a quick burst of healing

healing-potion.name: Healing potion
healing-potion.description: Tastes nice at first but has a bitter aftertaste. Provides a quick burst of healing

healing-balm.name: Healing balm
healing-balm.description: Simply apply it to your wound and watch it heal

roasted-rat-meat.name: Roasted rat meat
roasted-rat-meat.description: Smell might be fine now, but it still seems like a bad idea to eat it

roasted-purified-rat-meat.name: Roasted purified rat meat
roasted-purified-rat-meat.description: Smells alright and should be safe to eat, yet you still have some doubts

fried-pork.name: Fried pork
fried-pork.description: It's dripping with fat and smells fantastic, all it lacks is some spices and a good side dish

fried-goat-meat.name: Fried goat meat
fried-goat-meat.description: It has a nice aroma, but is a bit too tough. Perhaps a stew would have been a better choice?

pork-roast.name: Pork roast
pork-roast.description: A generous amount of herbs has been rubbed into the meat, resulting in a hearty meal with a mouthwatering aroma

goat-stew.name: Goat stew
goat-stew.description: Goat meat boiled to tenderness in a herbal broth. Perfect to warm yourself up for the road

crab-bisque.name: Crab bisque
crab-bisque.description: A smooth, creamy crab soup, lightly seasoned with fragrant herbs and vegetables

clam-broth.name: Clam broth
clam-broth.description: Briny, flavorful, and tastes of the ocean. In a good way

alligator-jerky.name: Alligator jerky
alligator-jerky.description: It's tough meat, but it'll keep you from going hungry for a long time

snake-jerky.name: Snake jerky
snake-jerky.description: It's rubbery meat, but it'll keep you from going hungry for a long time

turtle-jerky.name: Turtle jerky
turtle-jerky.description: It's stringy meat, but it'll still keep you from going hungry for a long time

turtle-soup.name: Turtle soup
turtle-soup.description: Tonight you dine on turtle soup

swampland-skewer.name: Swampland skewer
swampland-skewer.description: There's no better way to feed on the creatures of the swampland

basin-gumbo.name: Basin gumbo
basin-gumbo.description: An incredibly complex meal that's difficult to make, but it's got an indescribable taste

fried-frog-meat.name: Fried frog meat
fried-frog-meat.description: Tastes a bit like bird, and a bit like fish

kingsized-frog-legs.name: Kingsized frog legs
kingsized-frog-legs.description: The legs are agreed to be the best part, and when cooked with proper seasoning, considered a delicacy by some

fish-skewer.name: Fish skewer
fish-skewer.description: Several small fish cooked together on a stick. While none of them have much meat on them individually, together they make for a servicable meal

fried-fish.name: Fried fish
fried-fish.description: A fish fried whole. A simple but fulfilling meal

fish-steak.name: Fish steak
fish-steak.description: Properly filleted and cooked. A much better experience than eating them whole
